## Tags
warning, alert, danger, exclamation mark

## Categories
notifications, shapes

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/octagon-alert)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::OctagonAlert;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        OctagonAlert { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
